body_preview: - `yyds deepseek cache-report` timed out at 15s during Day 122 preflight self-test (Assessment §Self-Test Results, line 35). - The command reads the full 63K-line `.yoyo/state/events.jsonl` (67.9MB) to compute cache statistics. - The same read-everything pattern was fixed in `state doctor` (Day 117), `state crashes` (Day 122), and is being fixed in `state wh
expected_evidence: `yyds deepseek cache-report` completes within 15 seconds Task lineage shows file edits in src/commands_deepseek.rs Self-test report shows zero timeouts across all diagnostic commands Implementation: In `src/commands_deepseek.rs`, find where `render_cache_report` or its caller loads events. Add a sampling cap: read only the most recent N events (e.g., 10000)
title: Fix yyds deepseek cache-report timeout — add event sampling cap
